base_url.description: Jamf Pro API base URL, e.g. https://<subdomain>.jamfcloud.com/api. Required (not derived from a bare subdomain) — see docs.md Known limits.

username.description: Jamf Pro API username, sent as the HTTP Basic username on the token exchange.

password.description: Jamf Pro API password, sent as the HTTP Basic password on the token exchange (POST /v1/auth/token). Never logged.

max_pages.description: Maximum pages; use 0, all, or unlimited to exhaust the stream.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
